ogTitle: Semaphore South vs Senior: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Semaphore South and Senior.
heading: Semaphore South vs Senior — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Semaphore South, South Australia and Senior, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Senior has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Semaphore South (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Semaphore South or Senior safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Semaphore South has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Senior scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Semaphore South scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Senior scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Semaphore South or Senior?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Senior has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
